title: Gale, Ian - Director General  of Joint Force Development, Ministry of Defence - ACOBA advice
body: "Chief Growth Officer, Draken Europe  Air Marshal Ian Gale sought the Committee’s advice about taking up an appointment with Draken Europe. The letter containing the Committee’s consideration and the conditions imposed on the appointment was sent in October 2024; and the appointment was announced later that month. An accessible version of the letter is available here. "
